name: Slow Cooker Sweet and Sour Pork Steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown pork steaks on both sides in hot oil. Drain fat.
2. Transfer to any size Crock-Pot.
3. In a bowl, combine pineapple, green pepper, water, brown sugar, ketchup, tapioca, soy sauce, and dry mustard.
4. Pour the mixture over pork steaks. Cover.
5. Cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours or on High for 4 to 5 hours.
6. Serve over rice if desired.
